Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 

118 
TAX_NUM 
LABEL: 
Provider Tax Number 
DESCRIPTION: The federal taxpayer identification number (TIN) that identifies the 
provider/physician/practice/supplier to whom payment is made for the service. 
SHORT NAME: TAX_NUM 
LONG NAME: TAX_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
CCW 
FILE(S): 
IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This
